zh.lifeSummary: 當John Norton於1483年出生在英國貝德福爾斯特亞特利 煙雨 沙沙時，他的父親Sir John Norton25歲，母親Margaret Warde24歲。他和Jane Cooper至少有12個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1556年2月16日在他的家鄉享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Norton was born in 1483, in Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Sir John Norton, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Warde, was 24. He had at least 12 sons and 2 daughters with Jane Cooper. He died on 16 February 1556, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Norton родился в 1483 г. в местности шарпено, стритли вит шарпено, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Norton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Warde, 24. У него было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 2 дочери от Jane Cooper. Он умер 16 февраля 1556 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Norton nació en 1483, en Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Norton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Warde, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 12 hijos y 2 hijas con Jane Cooper. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1556, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años.
